about.heading: About Us
about.description: Prambanan Digital is a software development company dedicated to realizing your vision at the right price. We offer a pay-as-you-go model, allowing you to invest only in the features you need, saving time and resources by avoiding unnecessary development.
about.missionDescription: To empower businesses of all sizes with affordable, high-quality custom software solutions that drive measurable growth and operational efficiency.
about.visionDescription: To be Indonesia's most trusted software development partner, known for delivering exceptional value, transparent pricing, and lasting client relationships.

testimonials.heading: Testimonials
testimonials.title: Trusted by Growing Businesses
testimonials.subtitle: Hear what our clients have to say about working with Prambanan Digital.

faq.heading: FAQ
faq.title: Got Questions? We've Got Answers
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about working with us.

items.question: How much does a custom software project cost?
items.answer: Our projects start from a competitive fixed price based on your specific requirements. We provide a detailed proposal with transparent pricing before starting — no hidden costs or surprises.

items.question: How long does it take to develop an application?
items.answer: Timelines vary by complexity. A standard web application typically takes 4-8 weeks, while more complex systems may take 3-6 months. We provide a clear timeline during our initial consultation.

items.question: Do you provide ongoing support after launch?
items.answer: Absolutely! We offer flexible maintenance and support packages to keep your software running smoothly, including bug fixes, feature updates, and performance monitoring.

items.question: Can you work with our existing tech stack?
items.answer: Yes. Our team has expertise across a wide range of technologies. We can integrate with your existing systems or recommend the best stack for your specific needs.

items.question: What is the 'Developer as a Service' model?
items.answer: DaaS gives you access to our skilled developers who work as an extension of your team. You get the talent you need without the overhead of full-time hires — scale up or down as your project demands.

chatbot.title: Prambanan Assistant
chatbot.welcome: Hi! I'm Prambanan Assistant. How can I help you today?
initialOptions: I want to build a website/app
I want to request a demo

responses.default: I'm sorry, I didn't quite get that. Would you like to talk to a human consultant?
responses.build: That sounds great! We specialize in custom web and mobile apps. Would you like to see our portfolio or talk to a human for a quote?
responses.demo: You can request a demo by clicking the 'Strategic Consultation' button or fill the form in our Contact section. Or I can connect you to our team on WhatsApp.
responses.services: We provide E-Government systems, SIAKAD for schools, and custom web/mobile development. Which one are you interested in?
responses.human: Connecting you to our team... Please wait.
responses.waitingForHuman: Connecting you to our consultant... Please wait, we'll respond shortly.
responses.telegramMessage:
*New Human Assistance Request*

User is requesting help from the website assistant.

securityCompliance.heading: Security & Compliance
securityCompliance.title: Secure & Regulatory Complaint Ecosystem
securityCompliance.subtitle: We understand that government and education data are critical assets. Our infrastructure is designed to meet the highest security standards and regulatory compliance in Indonesia.

features.title: End-to-End Data Encryption
features.description: All data communication and cloud storage are secured using military-grade encryption standards (AES-256) to prevent sensitive data leaks.

features.title: PSE & Local Regulatory Compliance
features.description: The system is designed to comply with PDP Law (Personal Data Protection) and is officially registered for use by institutions in Indonesia.

features.title: Audit Log & Accountability
features.description: Transparency is guaranteed through user activity recording (Audit Trail), making it easy to track for inspectorate or audit needs.

specializedSolutions.heading: Sectoral Solutions
specializedSolutions.title: Integrated Systems for Gov & Education
specializedSolutions.subtitle: We don't just build websites. We build integrated systems that solve management, public service, and academic problems from top to bottom.

govServices.title: E-Government System (SPBE)
govServices.desc: Digitalization of electronic-based public and government services.

govServices.title: Integrated Licensing System
govServices.desc: One-stop licensing service application to accelerate bureaucracy.

govServices.title: Executive Dashboard (Command Center)
govServices.desc: Real-time analytical reporting system to monitor institutional performance.

eduServices.title: SIAKAD (Academic Information System)
eduServices.desc: Integrated management of student, lecturer, schedule, and grade data.

eduServices.title: Integrated Foundation Management System
eduServices.desc: Digitalization of asset, finance, and HR management for foundations/schools.

solutions.heading: Sectoral Solutions
solutions.title: Tailored Systems for Key Industries
solutions.subtitle: Discover how our custom platforms enable digital readiness, compliance, and growth for your sector.
solutions.govDesc: Robust, compliant, and secure platforms (SPBE) to automate public licensing, track assets, and drive data-backed administrative decisions.
solutions.eduDesc: Integrated academic management (SIAKAD), interactive LMS platforms, and educational foundation ERPs tailored for schools and universities.
solutions.bizDesc: Tailored Enterprise Resource Planning systems, automated inventory, real-time dashboards, and CRM integrations to optimize private sector operations.

govPage.title: Government Digitalization (SPBE)
govPage.subtitle: Empowering public service delivery through secure, regulatory-compliant, and transparent software solutions.
govPage.featureSubtitle: Built according to the Indonesian SPBE guidelines to simplify bureaucracy and improve accountability.

features.title: E-Government System (SPBE)
features.desc: Digitalization of electronic-based public and government services to enhance citizen experience and optimize workflow efficiency.

features.title: One-Stop Licensing System
features.desc: Automated queues, multi-department approval routing, and digital licensing issuance designed to reduce processing times.

features.title: Executive Dashboard (Command Center)
features.desc: Consolidate regional and departmental KPIs into a real-time analytics panel for rapid policy decision-making.

bizPage.title: Business Systems & Custom ERP
bizPage.subtitle: Streamline your business operations, automate manual workflows, and scale with custom ERP software.
bizPage.featureSubtitle: We construct solutions specifically matching your company workflows, removing overheads and maximizing yield.

features.title: Custom ERP Integrations
features.desc: Consolidate your procurement, inventory, finance, and human resource modules under a single, cohesive database.

features.title: Smart Inventory & Warehouse Management
features.desc: Real-time stock level tracking, automated low-stock warnings, and multi-location warehouse synchronization.

features.title: Advanced CRM & Sales Portals
features.desc: Lead pipelines, sales intelligence dashboards, and customer portals designed to boost conversion and retention.

servicesPage.title: Custom Engineering & DaaS
servicesPage.subtitle: High-performance custom applications, software modernization, and flexible developer resources.
servicesPage.daasDesc: Scale your team instantly with our experienced developers. We integrate directly into your workflow, standups, and Git repository.
servicesPage.customDesc: End-to-end custom application development, from wireframing and UI/UX design to robust cloud architecture and deployment.
servicesPage.optimizeDesc: Audit, optimize, and refactor your existing legacy software to resolve bottlenecks, patch security holes, and boost performance.

productsPage.title: Innovative Digital Products
productsPage.subtitle: Pioneering platforms and SaaS tools built by Prambanan Digital to solve specific business and administrative challenges.
productsPage.cmsDesc: A high-conversion SaaS landing page builder with built-in multi-language management, fast load speed, and SEO capabilities.
